arguments.task: Open official Zoho CRM pages needed to verify this app for developer research. Read and extract evidence from canonical first-party pages for: (1) product description from Zoho CRM site, (2) API/developer docs describing Zoho CRM APIs and API types, (3) authentication methods documented for Zoho CRM APIs, including every documented method if multiple exist, (4) pricing or plan/access page showing whether access is self-serve free, trial, or paid, (5) any official Zoho page about MCP server or MCP support for Zoho CRM if it exists. Return the final answer as structured notes with the exact page URLs used and concise supporting quotes or facts from each page. Do not use search-result snippets or third-party sites; prefer top-level docs pages that load in a browser.

input.thought: Start a browser run on official Zoho pages to gather first-party evidence for description, auth, API surface, pricing, and MCP support.

raw_result.description: Zoho CRM is a customer relationship management platform for managing sales, marketing, customer support, and inventory in a single system.
raw_result.auth_notes: The Zoho CRM developer docs page reviewed describes multiple API families and links into API documentation, but the gathered evidence in this pass only supports OAuth-based authorization for Zoho APIs; no first-party page was gathered here that clearly documents additional Zoho CRM auth schemes for this app, so only oauth2 is included.
raw_result.gating_reason: Zoho CRM pricing is publicly self-serve and advertises a free trial on its pricing page.

api_surface.breadth: Official developer docs describe multiple Zoho CRM API families, including Core APIs, Bulk APIs, Notification APIs, Query APIs, and GraphQL APIs, indicating broad programmatic coverage across CRM data and events.
api_surface.mcp_notes: No official Zoho CRM MCP page was established in the gathered evidence; marking no existing MCP as an evidence-limited finding requiring human review.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Rate-limit details were not verified from the gathered first-party pages in this pass.
raw_result.notable_signals: Zoho CRM has a dedicated developer hub and publicly describes several API families, including GraphQL alongside multiple REST-style API categories, which is a strong signal for agent-toolkit coverage.
raw_result.human_review_reason: Structured-field uncertainty remains for auth_methods and mcp_exists because the gathered evidence did not include a directly read first-party authentication page or any official MCP page; the developer-doc hub supports the broad API-surface conclusion, but these specific structured decisions were not fully evidenced in the collected pages.

result.description: Zoho CRM is a customer relationship management platform for managing sales, marketing, customer support, and inventory in a single system.
result.auth_notes: The Zoho CRM developer docs page reviewed describes multiple API families and links into API documentation, but the gathered evidence in this pass only supports OAuth-based authorization for Zoho APIs; no first-party page was gathered here that clearly documents additional Zoho CRM auth schemes for this app, so only oauth2 is included.
